issues.description: Action type is 'PlayFromHand' but card text says 'Add up to 1 {Thriller Bark Pirates} type card from your trash to your hand' – this is a retrieval from trash, not playing from hand. Should be 'ReturnToHand' with source filter for trash.
Filter references 'subType' but should specify the source as trash. Missing 'source' parameter to indicate cards are retrieved from trash, not hand.
